text: During this window we're living in right now, the next 3 to 5 years, if you can [clears throat] take your best empathy and anticipate what people will want in this age of incredible abundance, what what will enable the AI to unlock a new capability? What data does it need? You know, what are the components that I can bring to the table that empower it to do something it doesn't wasn't otherwise doing? And then turn your empathy gene on and say, what will people want? And if you can nail that, it's the best time in history to be executing because the execution is getting cheaper and cheaper and cheaper. So really just be a visionary and imagine what is the customer going to need that they just couldn't do yesterday. That's the differentiating factor.

title: What Makes Founders WIN When AI Does Everything? | MOONSHOTS
